prestazioni: Novitec N-Tronic 740 Stage 3 ECU remap for the F140 EB 6.3L V12 (naturally aspirated), optimizing ignition timing, fuel maps, and throttle response to achieve 740 PS (730 hp) at 8,200 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline, paired with a Novitec-specific 100-cell catalytic converter delete for unrestricted exhaust flow

Forged internals upgrade including Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio), and a Novitec-spec billet crankshaft with upgraded main bearings (ACL Race Series) to handle the increased power and 9,000 RPM limit

Novitec-tuned KW Suspension Variant 5 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and preload), custom-valved for the FF's AWD system, paired with Eibach Pro-Street S anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing subframe bushings (SuperPro) to eliminate flex in the 4RM drivetrain
estetica: Novitec N-Largo widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders (extended 50mm per side), rear quarter panels (extended 60mm per side), and a custom 3D-printed aluminum rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust outlets for the Novitec titanium exhaust system (4.5-inch tips)

Novitec-specific carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards (3D-molded from pre-preg autoclave carbon) and a rear wing (Gurney flap adjustable) mounted on a custom aluminum substructure, tested in Novitec's wind tunnel for 120 kg of downforce at 250 km/h

Novitec 22-inch forged aluminum wheels (NF10 design) with a staggered fitment (9.5Jx22 ET35 front, 12Jx22 ET45 rear), wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 ZR22 front, 315/25 ZR22 rear), paired with Novitec-specific carbon ceramic brake discs (410mm front, 390mm rear) and Brembo GT-R calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with titanium pistons
